examples: He was my inspiration when I was a boy a worrier to look up to.
Fussy, a worrier, overcritical, harsh, perfectionist and conservative.
Many of the participants were something of a worrier throughout their life.
Now he was a worrier, a weeper, a specialist only in the art of freestyle distress.
Rosenthal, once rigorously policed newsroom opinions as executive editor, is a leading worrier.
